title: Videomancer
description: Videomancer is a real-time FPGA video effects console: a full LZX image-processing instrument in a single box. Patch HDMI, composite, or component, route analog or digital in either direction, and perform with dedicated hardware (knobs, toggles, fader) at sub-frame latency. Ten-bit paths, four audio/CV modulation inputs, class-compliant MIDI, USB, optional microSD program loading, and firmware updates via the free LZX Connect app. In-depth program reference, I/O, specs, and troubleshooting are in the product Manual and Quick Start on this site; use those for every format, table, and FAQ.
